name: harness-dashboard-vscode
description: Visual whiteboard to map, trace and manage AI agent architectures (subagents, skills, relationships). Supports Harness SDD, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Copilot and more.

commands.title: Harness Dashboard: Check AI Provider Status

harness-dashboard.adapters.claude-code.p.description: Path to the Claude Code agent configuration directory (relative to workspace root).

harness-dashboard.adapters.claude-code.d.description: Auto-discover hook and steering files for the Claude Code adapter (R9). Per-adapter overrides go in .harness-dashboard/config.json.

harness-dashboard.adapters.cursor.path.description: Path to the Cursor agent configuration directory (relative to workspace root).

harness-dashboard.adapters.cursor.discov.description: Auto-discover hook and steering files for the Cursor adapter (R9). Per-adapter overrides go in .harness-dashboard/config.json.

harness-dashboard.adapters.gemini-cli.pa.description: Path to the Gemini CLI agent configuration directory (relative to workspace root).

harness-dashboard.adapters.gemini-cli.di.description: Auto-discover hook and steering files for the Gemini CLI adapter (R9). Per-adapter overrides go in .harness-dashboard/config.json.

harness-dashboard.adapters.copilot.path.description: Path to the GitHub Copilot instructions directory (relative to workspace root). The .vscode/prompts/ directory is unaffected by this setting.

harness-dashboard.adapters.copilot.disco.description: Auto-discover hook and steering files for the Copilot adapter (R9). Per-adapter overrides go in .harness-dashboard/config.json.

harness-dashboard.adapters.windsurf.path.description: Path to the Windsurf rules directory (relative to workspace root).

harness-dashboard.adapters.windsurf.disc.description: Auto-discover hook and steering files for the Windsurf adapter (R9). Per-adapter overrides go in .harness-dashboard/config.json.

harness-dashboard.adapters.kiro.path.description: Path to the Kiro agent configuration directory (relative to workspace root).

harness-dashboard.adapters.kiro.discover.description: Auto-discover hook and steering files for the Kiro adapter (R9). Per-adapter overrides go in .harness-dashboard/config.json.

harness-dashboard.discovery.root.description: Scan <workspace-root>/hooks/ and <workspace-root>/steering/ for hook/steering files regardless of which adapters are detected (R8, R10). Disable if you keep your hooks/steering only under framework-specific roots.

harness-dashboard.codeQuality.verifyOnSa.description: Run the KISS and DRY hooks on every save of a TS/TSX file under src/.

harness-dashboard.codeQuality.blockOnSav.description: Cancel the save if the verifier reports any error-severity issue.

harness-dashboard.codeQuality.severity.description: Severity for all reported issues. 'error' promotes all warnings to errors.

harness-dashboard.ai.apiKey.description: API key for the OpenAI-compatible fallback provider (R5). When empty, the fallback is disabled and only vscode.lm is tried.

harness-dashboard.ai.endpoint.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible chat completions API (R5). Change to use a different provider (e.g. Ollama, LM Studio, Azure OpenAI).

harness-dashboard.ai.model.description: Model identifier for the OpenAI-compatible API (R5). Sent as the 'model' field in the request body.
